name: Compliance Routing
description: Advisory mod that routes evidence naming a regulatory/compliance framework (HIPAA/GDPR/PCI DSS/SOC 2/CCPA/SOX/FedRAMP/NIST/...) to a compliance reviewer so the regulated scope is weighed before a change lands.
advises_on: Named regulatory/compliance frameworks (HIPAA/GDPR/PCI/PCI DSS/SOC 2/CCPA/SOX/FERPA/GLBA/FedRAMP/ISO 27001/NIST/data subject/breach notification/...) in title + body + evidence excerpts.
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Routes evidence naming a regulatory framework to compliance review; a routing signal, never a finding-of-record.
